creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
support sendmail 8.10.1 for FreeBSD systems.
	be aware you have to move and modify
	your mailer configuration, to reflect that
	mail.local is not SUID root any more.
	add to your mc file:
		MODIFY_MAILER_FLAGS(`LOCAL', `+S')dnl

Fix: install this shell archive in the ports tree
